## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project (run `zig fmt`).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have added onboarding norm comments where applicable.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or memory leaks.
- [ ] The SHA-256 path integrity check passes locally.
- [ ] Checked for hardcoded secrets or API keys.
